gh_8d3d4b455493191722317dda.title: We're hiring!! Senior Full-Stack Engineer (High-Performance Web)
gh_8d3d4b455493191722317dda.description:
🚀 **We’re hiring builders of the future (in code).**

Maestro is a startup born from research at **MIT** and the **University of Cambridge** 🧠🎓
Our mission is simple and ambitious: **use software to change the way we build**. We turn complex design data into clear, real-time instructions for the people (and soon machines 🤖) assembling our world.

🛠 **The Product**
**Maestro Pilot** is a web-based platform that converts BIM/CAD models, engineering inputs, and site feedback into:

* Interactive **3D assembly manuals**
* **Real-time completion tracking** for clients
  We digest massive BIM models, use **AI** to generate logical assembly sequences, and visualize everything in a custom **3D engine**.
  We’re building the **operating system for next-generation construction**.

📍 **Proof, not slides**
We bootstrapped by proving the tech in the field.
In just 24 months, Maestro has delivered **mass-timber and steel projects** across Europe and the US 🌍
Results? Less re-work, faster schedules, and lower carbon impact ♻️

🔭 **What’s next**
Manufacturers are lining up for enterprise trials.
Now we’re expanding the **software team** to ship the next-gen Pilot and make **digital assembly the industry default**.

💻 **Your Mission**
You’ll build the application backbone of a high-performance **Single-Page Application (SPA)** that connects massive geometric datasets (1M+ objects) directly to the user’s fingertips.

You’ll work on:

* Advanced **UI architecture** (React, SSR/RSC, hydration, rendering strategies)
* **Complex data visualization** (datagrids, flowcharts, 3D overlays)
* **State management** at scale (Redux, Zustand, XState)
* **Algorithms & data structures** (graphs, trees, BIM traversal)
* **Performance-first engineering** (benchmarking, custom lightweight solutions)

🤝 **How you’ll collaborate**

* With the **Graphics Lead** to sync React UI with a custom Three.js engine
* With the **AI Engineer** to visualize AI agents, streaming outputs, and interactive chat interfaces

🧠 **The reality**
From optimizing recursive SQL queries in the morning, to refactoring heavy UI components in the afternoon, your work directly impacts live construction sites.

🎁 **What we offer**

* Real ownership: your code ships to **active job-sites**
* Steep growth: work side-by-side with founders
* Equity for top performers 💎
* Startup energy with **real-world, physical impact**

📍 **Location**: Turin (hybrid)

🔥 Join us early. Ship code that leaves the screen and enters the real world.

👉 **Apply via our Dev Portal** https://www.maestro-tech.com/careers/

#Hiring #FrontendEngineering #ReactJobs #TechCareers #StartupJobs #DevJobs
#3DRendering #BIM #AIEngineering #ConstructionTech #DigitalTransformation
``

gh_8db85587dee791f9b3c4b60d.title: [Remote] Full  Stack  AI Engineer | React/Node.js | AWS Serverless & AI Focus@ beyond AI
gh_8db85587dee791f9b3c4b60d.description:
<!-- 
==================================================
POR FAVOR, SÓ POSTE SE A VAGA FOR PARA FRONT-END!

!!! Temos 4 regrinhas básicas: https://git.io/JG3Z9 !!!

Não faça distinção de gênero no título da vaga.

Use: "Front-End Developer" ao invés de 
"Desenvolvedor Front-End" \o/

Exemplo: `[São Paulo] Front-End Developer na NOME DA EMPRESA`
==================================================
-->

## Nossa empresa
Beyond AI
 “Exciting opportunity to work remotely with a Brazilian company on an international project, startup, impactful AI solutions.”  


## Descrição da vaga
**Full Stack Engineer | React/Node.js | AWS Serverless & AI Focus**

We are a fast-growing, AI-driven tech startup dedicated to building innovative solutions that impact millions of users. We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Full Stack Engineer to join our remote, international team. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable, high-performance applications using modern JavaScript stacks and cutting-edge AWS Serverless architecture.

## Local

Remote

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**

- Experience: Minimum 3+ years of professional experience in Full Stack  Development.

- AWS & Serverless: Mandatory hands-on experience with AWS (e.g., S3, DynamoDB, CloudFront) and significant, proven experience deploying and managing production applications using AWS Lambda.

- AI Development Experience: Mandatory practical experience in the development cycle of AI/ML features. This includes integrating and consuming Machine Learning models or AI services (e.g., LLMs, Computer Vision) into production applications, and handling related data pipelines.

**- Stack: Strong proficiency in Node.js (Backend) and React (Frontend).** 

- Language: Advanced/Fluent English (written and verbal) is required for daily collaboration with international teams.
- 
- Methodology: Solid understanding of software architecture principles, testing (Jest/Cypress), and CI/CD pipelines.
- 
- Startup environment


**Desejáveis:**
Experience with Next.js is a plus.




## Benefícios

_Remote
-Earn in USD 
Range - 3k - 5k USD $



## Contratação

Full Contract 

## Como se candidatar

Ready to build the future with Serverless and AI in a fast-paced environment?

email to : adri@reachbeyond.ai


## Labels

#### Alocação

- Remote


#### Regime

- Contractor

#### Nível

- Mid level
- Senior level

gh_8d2dea6ad7cb933624d6cf76.title: 【徵才】區塊鏈java運維工程師(赴日本工作)10/12更
gh_8d2dea6ad7cb933624d6cf76.description:
團隊簡介/地點
MaskEX是一個大型跨國團隊，位於幾個不同的地理區域。旨在成為全球最安全、最私密的加密貨幣交易所之一。多重安全保障，MaskEX 採用了“Your Wallet,Your Way”的口號以反映其在自由運動中發揮重要作用的使命，通過為大眾提供財務匿名性和自治。
工作地點：日本 大阪地區

工作內容：
1.參與金融項目的需求開發
2.配合測試解決系統問題，並優化系統代碼
3.參與解決系統中的一些其他問題。

能力要求：
1.5年以上JAVA專案開發經驗，JAVA基礎（JVM、多線程、集合，網路）紮實，代碼編寫工整、規範
2.熟悉spring boot, spring cloud，對微服務架構有清晰的認識，能夠在微服務體系框架內進行相應開發
3.熟悉redis,rabbit mq, elasticsearch，能熟練使用ELK者優先考慮
4.熟練使用mysql，具備分庫分表的設計能力和大數據量查詢優化的處理經驗
5.熟悉Linux系統常用命令，熟悉docker的使用，寫過docker file，熟悉docker compose
6.有過高並發系統的開發和設計經驗，針對高並發場景能夠提出自己的解決辦法並處理實施；
7.具有良好的團隊合作和溝通能力，有很強的自驅力，能主動為結果負責
8.有較強的代碼質量控制意識和良好技術、業務理解能力。

加分
1.參與過大型分布式系統的設計和開發，有服務化、高並發系統的架構設計和開發經驗者佳
2.有過IM/金融專案的開發經驗佳。


薪資範圍
3500-6000美金(保障八險一金、提供在日工作簽證。)
薪資可選擇日幣或USDT，但因相關政策規定需固定比例日幣發放。

福利/推薦項
1.免費住宿
2.租房&生活補貼
3.營收獎金分發
4.開放式辦公空間
5.大阪商圈。

聯絡方式
Kino先生
E-mail: kino@ku.com
skype： live:.cid.66b1344821d6eabe
telegram： @hrkino1116
